nasb.text: The porch in front of the nave of the house was twenty cubits in length, corresponding to the width of the house, and its depth along the front of the house was ten cubits.

esv.text: The vestibule in front of the nave of the house was twenty cubits long, equal to the width of the house, and ten cubits deep in front of the house.

cnv.text: 殿的前廊長九公尺，和殿的寬度一樣，寬四公尺半。

ccb.text: 殿前的门廊和殿一样宽九米，深四米半。
